title: What Recruiters Expect from you?
speaker: Adarsh Varghese (ECE '24)
description: Find out in the Talks Session with Adarsh Varghese, Firmware Engineer at TISMO. Gain valuable insights into recruiter expectations, placement preparation and the qualities that help candidates stand out.

title: Cracking a Management Role
speaker: Nimisha Nair (ECE '22)
company: Ex-KPMG Analyst | Global Outperformer Trainee @ Hilti
description: The EPOCH is delighted to present an insightful session on navigating and excelling in management careers.

title: Placement Talk Session 4
speaker: Asvin M (ECE '23), Abhijith V J (ECE '23)
description: Placements need more than grades — recruiters look for skills, mindset, communication, and initiative. Join us to gain insights on industry expectations, placement journeys, and building a standout profile

title: Placement Talk Session 3
speaker: Athul
description: Step into an insightful session with Athul, Senior Embedded Firmware Engineer at Texas Instruments, and gain industry perspectives on placements, skills, and career growth.

title: Stepping into the Core Sector
speaker: Diya Rose Thomas, Keshav Balakrishnan
description: EPOCH in collaboration with Internship Cell CET is back with Session 2 of our placement series  focusing on the core electronics domain— Digital Design and Verification.

title: Cracking the Management Role
speaker: Anu, Sreelakshmi
description: The EC Association brings you an insightful talk session — Cracking the Management Role , featuring our speakers Anu and Sreelakshmi, placed at KPMG.
